'''''Bazaar''''' was an [[Ithorian Herdship]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Bazaar_levels.jpg|thumb|left|150px|The levels of Bazaar]]
''Bazaar'' was similar to almost every other [[Ithorian Herdship]], being a huge flattened ball which was designed to simulate the jungles of [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]], the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] homeworld, in a space-worthy vessel.

==History==
''Bazarr'' contained the city of [[Isttu Village|Isttu]], and was dispatched to move through the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] between the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]] and the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]]. It was most famous for its vast markets and villages. Soon after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|battle of Hoth]], the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] arms dealer [[Lernik De'Yago]] sold an illegally-modified [[GX1 short hauler/Legends|Short Hauler]] he had stolen, the ''[[Nova Whisper]]'', to a ship dealer on ''Bazaar''. The dealer recognized some of the customizations, got rid of them, and auctioned the ship.<ref name="ss">''[[Stock Ships]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
